title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin presents a practical implementation of Anthropic's playbook for Claude Code in large codebases. He built an AI Layer harness including CLAUDE.md hierarchy, self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCP, subagents, and a bundling plugin, demonstrating that the surrounding infrastructure matters more than the model itself.
